title_en: Doom: The Dark Ages Revelations DLC Revealed With New Spear Weapon and July Release Date - IGN
summary_en: Bethesda and id Software have revealed a first look at Doom: The Dark Ages | Revelations, a new campaign DLC release that’s coming to PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X | S with a July 7, 2026, release date.
body_en:
Bethesda and id Software have revealed a first look at Doom: The Dark Ages | Revelations, a new campaign DLC release that’s coming to PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X | S with a July 7, 2026, release date.
First gameplay showed the Doomslayer is sticking to his medieval theme for the add-on content, as he can be seen dismantling enemies with a new spear weapon in a collection of snowy environments. It can, of course, be hucked into demons, but it can also be used to reflect bullets. A few shots also show him using the new tool to grapple to ledges and levitate around enemies.
Doom: The Dark Ages | Revelations delivers the installment’s first campaign expansion when it launches this summer. You can see all of the bloody gameplay below.
"Wounded and betrayed, the Slayer is thrust into a merciless purgatory only escapable by confronting haunting truths and forging new strength with the help of a mysterious ally," an official story description shared in a post from Bethesda said. "He must ascend from the prison of his mind and fight an abomination of the gods to set his followers on the path to freedom."
If you need to catch up on all of the biggest reveals, you can check out everything announced at the Xbox Games Showcase 2026 .
Developing…
